alerts.source: DoorDash Frontier Liquors Evansville marketplace inventory
alerts.availabilityLabel: Listed on DoorDash; not marked out of stock
alerts.inventorySemantics: Indiana is a private retail market. ATC permit rows identify active package-store locations but are not bottle inventory. Retailer shop endpoints/pages such as CityHive can produce store-level bottle inventory/watch signals, with a verify-before-driving caveat.
alerts.reason: New store_level retailer_store_inventory_result signal for Tincup 10 Year Mountain Bourbon in IN.
alerts.evidence: DoorDash lists Tincup American Whiskey 84 Proof 10 Year Mountain Bourbon Whiskey Bottle (750 ml) at Frontier Liquors - Oak Hill Road, 1701 Oak Hill Road, Evansville, IN 47711 for $54.99, with no out-of-stock flag in the public retail item card.
